
[source layer]
  (F-series)
    [must-fix] UF-F7 main.tex — \setlength{\parindent}{0pt} overrides template's 1cm parindent (required: no zero-\parindent override in source (template's \parindent=1cm applies))
      fix: Remove the zero-`\parindent` override; the UF template's `\indentfirst` (cls:203) + `\parindent=1cm` (cls:1010) produce the required first-line indentation.
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-f7--paragraph-indentation

Summary: 1 must-fix, 0 review.

---
Note: Advisory (not a finding): The ufdissertation template produces untagged PDFs (no /StructTreeRoot, /MarkInfo, or /Lang entries). PDF/UA accessibility features such as tag structure, alt-text, table-header semantics, and reading order are therefore outside the scope of this tool's verification. This is a known template limitation, not a violation detected in your submission.
